subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and unto her who hath believed, verily He is the Forgiving, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم و للتی آمنت انه لهو الغفور الکریم یا
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for women, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
